data.title:
$BTC Coinbase premium back for the first time in November.

But besides that, we've seen the ratio slowly move back to equilibrium this week, as ETF and overall selling pressure has eased.

data.title: India’s Adani bankrolls Google’s infrastructure push with $5 billion cash injection
data.description:
Gautam Adani is putting down $5 billion to back Google’s new AI hub in southern India, according to a report by Bloomberg. The money is going into a data center complex being built in Visakhapatnam, a port city in Andhra Pradesh, through Adani’s infrastructure arm AdaniConneX Pvt. , which is a joint venture between Adani Enterprises […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indias-adani-bankrolls-google-with-5-billion/

data.title: Ethereum’s 6-Year Bullish Pennant Faces Final Test: Is the Breakout Finally Here?
data.description:

data.title: KuCoin EU Gains MiCAR Approval to Roll Out Digital Asset Services in Europe
data.description:
KuCoin has secured a major regulatory victory in Europe with its announcement that KuCoin EU Exchange GmbH (KuCoin EU) has officially obtained a Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCAR) license in Austria.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kucoin-eu-gains-mica-approval-to-roll-out-digital-asset-services-in-europe/

data.title: Significant BNB Transfer from ListaDAO to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 01:18, a total of 16,230.75 BNB, valued at approximately $14.3 million, was transferred from ListaDAO to an anonymous address starting with 0xEB16.

data.title: BlackRock Fund Buys More of Its Own Bitcoin ETF as Institutional Demand Explodes
data.description:

The post BlackRock Fund Buys More of Its Own Bitcoin ETF as Institutional Demand Explodes first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Tether Cuts Staff and Halts Mining in Uruguay Amid Soaring Power Costs
data.description:
Tether has suspended its Bitcoin mining operations in Uruguay due to rising energy costs and unresolved debt disputes with state-owned utility UTE.

The post Tether Cuts Staff and Halts Mining in Uruguay Amid Soaring Power Costs first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/11/28/tether-cuts-staff-halts-mining-uruguay/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=tether-cuts-staff-halts-mining-uruguay

data.description:
